title: Somwell – 100 x Brown Kraft Paper Bags, 8x8" Eco Friendly Brown Paper Bags For Sweets, Candy, Grocery, Fruit, Gifts, Crafts & Retail Packaging - Recyclable & Biodegradable (100, 8" x 8")
features: Eco Friendly, Plastic Free & Biodegradable – 100% recyclable and compostable, Somwell brown paper bags are suitable for reducing single use plastic in homes and businesses.
Bulk Value Pack of 100 Brown Kraft Paper Bags – Get excellent value with this bulk pack of 100 brown kraft bags from Somwell – perfect for high volume use.
Food & Snacks – Ideal for paper bags for packing sandwiches, fruit, nuts, cookies, crisps, pastries, popcorn, and candy. Suitable for lunchboxes, school snacks, picnics, and cafés.
Retail & Market Stalls – Use these Somwell kraft paper bags for groceries, veg, deli items, hardware, natural skincare, coffee beans, tea leaves, spices, or handmade soap
Gift Wrapping & Crafting – Personalise these Somwell brown paper bags with stamps, ribbons, or stickers for weddings, birthday party favours, baby showers, or custom branded packaging
description: Somwell Brown Kraft Paper Bags – a sustainable, plastic free solution for countless everyday needs. Whether you're a business owner, parent, or creative individual, these 100 x eco-friendly brown paper bags offer an affordable, green alternative for packaging, storage, and presentation. Made from recyclable kraft paper, these biodegradable brown bags are strong and suitable for both food and non-food items. Use them for packing sweets, candy, sandwiches, fruit, cookies, or snacks; organising screws, receipts or stationery; packaging groceries, vegetables, spices, or handmade products like soap or candles; or even as takeaway bags for cafés, lunch bags for school, craft paper for kids' activities, or stylish eco gift bags for parties, events, weddings and retail use. With Somwell, you're choosing reliability, sustainability, and style in every fold.
